retrieved_result: homage hom·age (hŏm′ĭj, ŏm′-)n.1. Formal acknowledgment by a vassal of allegiance to his lord under feudal law.2.a. Special honor or respect shown or expressed publicly. See Synonyms at honor.b. Something created or done in honor, admiration, or celebration of someone or something: The concert was an homag
